title: vitis bronneri
intro: Vitis bronneri, also known as Bronner's grape vine, is a species of grapevine native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its fruit, which contains antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vitis bronneri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Vitis bronneri include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress.
